compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for red-team-reviewer and blue-team-filter agents
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Create test files for the two new dedicated agent definitions that will be extracted from preplanning prompts.

**tests/skills/test_red_team_reviewer_agent.py**: Tests that validate:
- Agent file exists at plugins/dso/agents/red-team-reviewer.md
- YAML frontmatter contains name: red-team-reviewer, model: opus
- Body contains all 6 taxonomy categories including Consumer Impact / Operational Readiness
- Body contains Consumer Enumeration directive

**tests/skills/test_blue_team_filter_agent.py**: Tests that validate:
- Agent file exists at plugins/dso/agents/blue-team-filter.md
- YAML frontmatter contains name: blue-team-filter, model: sonnet
- Body contains artifact persistence instructions referencing ARTIFACTS_DIR
- Body contains full exchange persistence (accepted + rejected)

Test approach: Parse markdown agent files, verify structural content requirements.
Tests must FAIL (RED) since agent files do not yet exist.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test_red_team_reviewer_agent.py — Create
- tests/skills/test_blue_team_filter_agent.py — Create

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Red team test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_red_team_reviewer_agent.py
- [ ] Blue team test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_blue_team_filter_agent.py
- [ ] Tests fail (RED)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_red_team_reviewer_agent.py tests/skills/test_blue_team_filter_agent.py --tb=no -q 2>&1 | grep -q 'failed'

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — RED tests committed and pushed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
